audience_policies.source_phrase: NO RESERVATION NEEDED. Present your Nevins Memorial Library card at the museum to receive free admission! The Museum of Printing is open every Saturday 10am - 4 pm **You do not need to reserve this pass for the discount just show your Nevins Library Card**
